description: Test the 'Yerkes-Dodson law' (inverted U-shape relationship between anxiety and performance) using the loaded Exam Anxiety dataset. Perform a polynomial regression analysis with 'Exam' as the dependent variable, using 'Anxiety' and a computed squared 'Anxiety' variable as predictors. Include descriptive statistics in the output and save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Polynomial_Exam.jasp.
